mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MYTRANS ( TRAN_ID, TITLE, TRANS_DATE, ORIGINAL_AMOUNT, IS_SHARED, CATEGORY, TYPE, MEMO, USER_ID, GROUPB_ID, EXCLUDE_ANALYSIS) VALUES ( nextval('SEQ_MYTRANS'), #{title}, #{transDate}, #{originalAmount}, #{isShared}, #{category}, #{type}, #{memo}, #{userId}, #{groupBId}, #{excludeAnalysis} )
mapper.select: SELECT TRAN_ID AS "transId", TITLE AS "title", TRANS_DATE AS "transDate", ORIGINAL_AMOUNT AS "originalAmount", CATEGORY AS "category", TYPE AS "type", MEMO AS "memo", USER_ID AS "userId", IS_SHARED AS "isShared", GROUPB_ID AS "groupBId", EXCLUDE_ANALYSIS AS "excludeAnalysis" FROM MYTRANS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY TRAN_ID DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE MYTRANS SET TITLE = #{title}, TRANS_DATE = #{transDate}, ORIGINAL_AMOUNT = #{originalAmount}, CATEGORY = #{category} , TYPE = #{type}, MEMO = #{memo}, EXCLUDE_ANALYSIS = #{excludeAnalysis} WHERE TRAN_ID = #{transId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MYTRANS ( TRAN_ID, TITLE, TRANS_DATE, ORIGINAL_AMOUNT, IS_SHARED, CATEGORY, TYPE, MEMO, USER_ID, GROUPB_ID, FIXED_ID ) SELECT nextval('SEQ_MYTRANS'), f.NAME, CURRENT_DATE, f.AMOUNT, 'N', f.CATEGORY, 'OUT', '고정지출 자동등록', f.USER_ID, NULL, f.FIXED_ID FROM FIXEDTRANS f WHERE EXTRACT(DAY FROM CURRENT_DATE) = LEAST( f.PAY_DAY, EXTRACT(DAY FROM (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MYTRANS m WHERE m.FIXED_ID = f.FIXED_ID AND m.TRANS_DATE = CURRENT_DATE AND m.USER_ID = f.USER_ID )
mapper.select: SELECT TITLE AS "title", ORIGINAL_AMOUNT AS "originalAmount", CATEGORY AS "category", TYPE AS "type" FROM MYTRANS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_SHARED = 'N' ORDER BY TRAN_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY
